qry:select.name: qryDetail
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT MAX(PER.oi_personal) as oi_personal, MAX(PER.d_apellido) as d_apellido, MAX(PER.d_nombres) as d_nombres, MAX(PE.c_nro_cuil) as c_nro_cuil, MAX(PE.d_ape_y_nom) as d_ape_y_nom, PE.e_numero_legajo, MAX(PE.c_categoria_ult) as c_categoria_ult, MAX(PE.l_afiliado_sind) as l_afiliado_sind, MAX(UB.d_domic_expl) as d_domic_expl, MAX(PE.c_ubicacion) as c_ubicacion, MAX(LIQ.e_periodo) as e_periodo, MAX(LIQ.c_empresa) as c_empresa, MAX(V.{%=#VAR:@c_columna%}) as haberes_con_aportes
FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ93_UBICACIONES as UB, LIQ20_VAR_GR_CONC as V, PER30_SINDICATOS as SIND
JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, PE.c_personal INNER PER.c_personal, LIQ.oi_empresa_ddo INNER UB.oi_empresa_ddo, V.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, SIND.c_sindicato INNER PE.c_sindicato
WHERE LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@p_periodo} AND PE.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND LIQ.c_estado = \'F\' AND V.c_grupo = \'4\' AND PE.c_ubicacion = UB.c_ubicacion AND LIQ.c_tipo_liq != \'6\' AND LIQ.c_tipo_liq != \'7\' AND SIND.oi_sindicato = {#SOURCE:@oi_sindicato}
GROUP BY
PE.e_numero_legajo
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryHoraSindical
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT SUM(CL.n_valor) AS n_valor, SUM(CL.n_cantidad) AS n_cantidad
FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER as CL, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as CDDO, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as C, LIQ30_CONC_SUM as CONSUM, LIQ30_TOTALES as TOT JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER CL.oi_tot_liq_per, CL.oi_concepto_ddo INNER CDDO.oi_concepto_ddo, CDDO.c_concepto INNER C.c_concepto, C.oi_concepto INNER CONSUM.oi_concepto, CONSUM.oi_total INNER TOT.oi_total WHERE LIQ.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} AND PE.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND PE.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} AND TOT.c_total = \'INTAOT\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_def_variables_grupos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.c_columna, LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo FROM LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR, LIQ31_GRUPOS, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_grupo, LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_variable WHERE LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo = \'4\' and LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable = \'aa_remtotalsind\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_interfaces_categoria
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT CAT.c_interface FROM ORG18_CATEGORIAS as CAT WHERE CAT.c_categoria = {#PARAM:@c_categoria_ult} AND LEN(CAT.c_interface) > 0
')/ROWS/ROW
